column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Waving a hand towards a departing carriage" | TEXT="またお会いしましょう" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing towards someone leaving a gate" | TEXT="ごきげんよう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Tying a prayer strip to a bamboo tree" | TEXT="再会を期して" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a distant mountain longingly" | TEXT="健やかにお過ごしください" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a keepsake given by someone" | TEXT="ずっと待っておりますわ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Writing a letter with a soft expression" | TEXT="次会う時を夢見て" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Watching the sun set with a lonely smile" | TEXT="いつかまた、この場所で" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to a date on a scroll with a smile" | TEXT="約束の日を待っています" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Walking along a path toward the viewer" | TEXT="お帰りをお待ちしてました"
